eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 08:42 PM ON FEB 23, 2026 Effective until 09:42 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
WANTED FOR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER KILLED OR SERIOUSLY INJURED IN LINE OF DUTY ON MONDAY, 02/23/2026 AT 03:50 PM  AT  US 160 ,  HIGHLANDVILLE, MISSOURI

SUSPECT 1, RICHARD DEAN BIRD IS A WHITE, MALE, AGE 45, 5 FEET 6 INCHES TALL, 145 POUNDS, WITH A BALD HEAD AND BROWN EYES. 
LAST SEEN WEARING UNKNOWN CLOTHING. 
SUSPECT POSSIBLY HAS A BEARD. 
KNOWN TO BE ARMED WITH A FIREARM.

THIS ALERT HAS BEEN UPDATED TO INCLUDE SUSPECT INFORMATION FOR A FATAL SHOOTING OF A LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER IN CHRISTIAN COUNTY. THE SUSPECT VEHICLE HAS BEEN LOCATED; HOWEVER, THE SUSPECT IS STILL AT LARGE. . 

IF LOCATED, CONTACT YOUR LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT OR CALL 9 1 1.
